name: Hollandaise Sauce #1 (Bdgm08b)
recipeInstructions:
1. Into a container of an electric blender, measure the egg yolks, lemon juice, mustard, and salt.
2. Microwave the butter on HIGH in a glass measuring cup for 1-2 minutes until it is hot and bubbly.
3. Turn the electric blender to the highest speed and gradually add the butter, mixing well until the Hollandaise sauce is creamy and thickened.
4. Serve over fresh asparagus, Eggs Benedict, Filet Mignon, etc.
